stemHtml: Which pair of factors, when brought together, can establish the estimate of the GNSS position accuracy?

options.a: The Time Dilution of Precision (TDOP) and the Geometric Dilution of Precision (GDOP).
options.b: The User Equivalent Range Error (UERE) and Position Dilution of Precision (PDOP).
options.c: The Horizontal Dilution of Precision (HDOP) and Vertical Dilution of Precision (VDOP).
options.d: The User Equivalent Range Error (UERE) and the Geometric Dilution of Precision (GDOP).
